name: Sprunki school AU
description:
Welcome to your new school! Your class is... Kinda weird. But oh well.

Ughh sprunki yes, those colorful blobs made me go crazy, haven't made a bot in gazillion years. I couldn't bring myself to make Mr. Fun computer and Mr. Tree, that bot took me already what, 2 days? Also no Sky bc bro is 14💀 AND no black because i got sick of writing. They're all 18, idk what kinda school, maybe college or smth idk. Guys I'm too lazy don't come at me pls. I just thought a school setting would be fun.

Anyways, it's a bot with crazy high effort. I definitely look into criticism and feedback! Just lmk if i got something wrong. Thank youuu!

Tags:

Sprunki, Raddy, Oren, Vineria, Owakcx, Tunner, Jevin, Pinki, Wenda, Gray, Garnold, Clukr, Fun bot, Durple, Brud
